onboarding.slide1_body: Your official church app — services, events, devotionals, and community in one place.
onboarding.slide2_body: Show your QR at services or events. Your attendance is recorded automatically.
onboarding.slide3_body: Daily devotionals, branch news, and homecell info — keeping your faith fresh every day.

auth.quick_login_biometric_sub: Quick login without OTP on this device
auth.session_expired_relogin: Session expired. Please sign in again with OTP.
auth.face_coming_soon: Face recognition is coming in the next update
auth.guest_coming_soon: Guest mode is coming in the next update
auth.tos_notice: By signing in you agree to ECC Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.login_sub: We'll send a one-time code via WhatsApp
auth.not_registered_hint: Not registered yet? Contact your branch admin or use Create New Account.
auth.logout_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.error_not_registered: Phone not registered. Contact your branch admin or sign up.
auth.error_rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.error_otp_invalid: OTP code is invalid or expired.
auth.face_login_hint: Make sure your face is already enrolled in settings

signup.title: Create New Account
signup.phone_helper: OTP will be sent to WhatsApp for verification
signup.data_sub: Only 3 required fields. The rest can be filled in later in Profile.
signup.minimal_notice: Other details (date of birth, address, photo) can be added after signing in, in Profile → Edit.
signup.branch_error: Failed to load branches. Tap to retry.
signup.auto_active_notice: After registration, your account is instantly active and you'll be signed in automatically.
signup.success_msg: Your account is active. Welcome to the ECC family.
signup.cancel_confirm_msg: Your entered data will be lost.
signup.error_already_registered: This phone number is already registered. Try the Login menu.
signup.error_otp_expired_msg: OTP verification exceeded 15 minutes. Please restart.
signup.error_name_required: Name must be at least 2 characters

profile.title: My Profile
profile.scanner_mode_sub: Scan member QR to check in for services / events

family.title: My Family
family.empty_msg: Add family members to register together for events/services.
family.info_notice: Family members can be selected when registering for events or services so you can attend together.
family.add_intro: Choose how to add a family member to your account.
family.add_via_phone_sub: For those who already have an ECC account
family.scan_hint: Point camera at the member QR card
family.scan_invalid_qr: Invalid QR code. Make sure this is an ECC member card.
family.camera_permission_msg: App needs camera access to scan member QR.
family.add_phone_intro: Find family members who have an ECC account by their phone number.
family.phone_notice: Make sure the phone is already registered in ECC. For children without phone, use 'Register New'.
family.phone_not_found_msg: This phone is not registered in ECC. Try 'Register New' or invite them to sign up first.
family.add_new_intro: For children or elderly without a phone — you will be their guardian managing the account.
family.dependent_notice: This account can't log in independently. You will be the primary guardian.
family.unlink_confirm_msg: Family relation with {{name}} will be removed. Their account is not deleted.
family.edit_dependent_sub: Change name, date of birth, address of this dependent member
family.edit_dependent_soon: Dependent profile editing is awaiting backend endpoint. For now please contact your branch admin.

placeholder.persembahan_msg: Bank accounts and QRIS for giving. Coming in M4.

persembahan.title: Giving
persembahan.notice: Giving is voluntary. Please confirm with branch admin after transferring for proper record.
persembahan.qris_hint: Scan with any mobile banking or e-wallet app.
persembahan.no_qris: QRIS is not yet available for this account.
persembahan.empty_msg: This branch hasn't added giving accounts.

event.title: Events & Movements
event.empty_msg: No published events at the moment.
event.empty_filter_msg: Try changing the filter or the viewing branch.
event.note_placeholder: e.g. T-shirt size L, food allergy, etc
event.after_register_notice: After registering, you'll be asked to upload transfer proof. Completes when admin verifies.
event.after_register_free_notice: Free event. After registering you are automatically a participant.
event.nominal_bebas_hint: Give cheerfully as your heart leads. Minimum Rp 1,000.
event.permission_denied: Gallery access denied. Enable in Settings to upload photos.
event.camera_permission_denied: Camera access denied. Enable in Settings.
event.transfer_then_upload: Transfer first, then upload proof for admin verification
event.continue_payment_notice: You are already registered. Continue uploading transfer proof to confirm.
event.already_registered_recovery: You are already registered for this event. Continue to event detail to view payment status.
event.cancel_confirm_msg: Your slot will be available again. For paid events, refund must be processed manually via admin.
event.cancel_success: Registration cancelled. Your slot is now available again.
event.cancel_blocked_hadir: You already attended this event — cannot cancel.
event.cancel_not_registered: You are not registered for this event.

branch.switcher_sub: Traveling? See services & events at the branch you are visiting.
branch.switcher_notice: This only changes the view (services, events, giving) to the selected branch. Your home branch does not change.

qr.title: My QR Card
qr.instruction: Show this code when entering the church
qr.no_kode:
Member code not yet available.
Contact your branch admin.

ibadah.title: Service Schedule
ibadah.empty_msg: No services in the next 30 days. Check back later.

error.network: No internet connection. Please try again.
error.too_many_requests: Too many requests, please wait a moment.
error.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

branch_change.title: Change Home Branch
branch_change.reason_placeholder: e.g. Moving to Bandung starting June 2026 for a new job.
branch_change.reason_helper: At least 10 characters. Will be read by admin during review.
branch_change.process_notice: Request will be reviewed by the target branch admin. You'll be notified when approved or rejected.
branch_change.pending_msg: Wait for admin to review the previous request before submitting a new one.
branch_change.pending_exists_msg: You can only have 1 PENDING request. Wait for review or contact admin.
branch_change.direct_notice: Branch change takes effect immediately without admin approval.
branch_change.confirm_body: Your home branch will change to:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_msg: Service reminders, events, and important updates will appear here.
notifications.push_coming_soon: Push notifications are still in development. For now notifications appear locally in app.

settings.language_content_note: Service, devotional, and event content remains in Indonesian.
settings.about_description: ECC Global App — official app for ECC members covering services, events, devotionals, giving, and community.

scanner.title: Scanner Mode
scanner.subtitle: Pick a service / event to start scanning
scanner.empty_msg: You are not assigned as authorized scanner for any service or event. Contact branch admin.
scanner.scan_hint: Point camera at member QR card
scanner.paused_hint: Scanner paused — finish the previous one first
scanner.manual_hint: Type 8-character member QR code (uppercase letters or digits).
scanner.manual_invalid: Invalid code format (must be 8 chars A-Z or 0-9).
scanner.camera_permission_msg: Scanner needs camera access to scan member QR.
scanner.force_hint: Tap 'Force Check-in' to override this warning (e.g. cash on-the-spot payment).
scanner.error_not_found_msg: Code "{{kode}}" is not registered. Make sure this is an ECC member card.

quickaccess.title: Quick Access
quickaccess.bible_soon: Bible feature coming in the next update.
quickaccess.visit_soon: Member visit tracking coming in the next update.

homecell.title: My Homecells
homecell.subtitle: Homecells where you are PIC
homecell.empty_msg: You haven't been assigned as homecell PIC. Contact branch admin.
homecell.add_member_sub: Scan member QR card to join the homecell
homecell.members_empty: No members yet. Add via QR scan.
homecell.remove_confirm_msg: {{name}} will be removed from this homecell. Their account is not deleted.

area.title: Homecell Areas
area.subtitle: Areas + homecells you PIC
area.empty_msg: You haven't been assigned as area PIC. Contact branch admin.
area.no_managed_in_area: No homecells in this area that you also directly PIC. Tap from Homecell list for per-homecell detail.
area.no_homecells_in_area: No active homecells in this area yet.
area.partial_list_notice: Showing {{visible}} of {{total}} homecells in this area — only those you directly PIC. Full list needs a new BE endpoint.

printer.title: Bluetooth Printer
printer.expo_go_notice_msg: Bluetooth print needs production build (EAS Build). In Expo Go, scan devices + print button are simulation only — no actual print.
printer.no_devices_found: No printers found. Make sure printer is ON and in range.
printer.auto_print_sub: Automatically print label after every successful QR scan
printer.preview_note: Preview estimate — final print depends on printer + paper size.

bible.title: Bible
bible.subtitle: Daily Word of God
bible.bookmarks_empty: No bookmarks yet. Tap the bookmark icon while reading to save a verse.
bible.sample_only_msg: Full TB LAI content will be available after backend integration. Currently only selected chapters are bundled.
bible.sample_available_msg: These popular chapters are ready to read now.

face.settings_hero_enrolled: Active since {{date}}. Tap "Update Face" if your look changes.
face.settings_hero_not_enrolled: Register your face for fast OTP-less login and to support future auto-attendance features.
face.privacy_body: Your face is processed on-device into a unique 128-number code. ECC stores that code (not your photo) only for identity verification.
face.consent_body: I agree that ECC stores my face code for fast login and future auto-attendance features. I can delete this anytime in these settings.
face.update_sub: Replace face code with new capture if your look changes
face.delete_sub: Remove face code from ECC server
face.delete_confirm_body: Your face data will be permanently deleted from the ECC server. You can still sign in with OTP, and re-enroll anytime.
face.enroll_prompt_subtitle: Faster login without OTP and supports future auto-attendance features.
face.enroll_prompt_privacy: Your face code is stored at the ECC server as 128 numbers. You can delete anytime.
face.fallback_note: OTP login remains available anytime. If face login fails 3 times, you'll be redirected to OTP login.
face.camera_permission_body: ECC needs front camera access to capture your face. Photos are not stored — only the resulting 128-number code.
face.instruction_position: Position your face inside the oval
face.error_no_face: No face detected. Make sure your face is clearly visible.
face.error_multiple_faces: Multiple faces detected. Make sure only you are in frame.
face.error_low_quality: Quality too low. Try in better light.
face.error_engine_not_ready: Face engine not ready. Wait a few seconds.
face.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
face.error_face_not_enrolled: Face not registered on server. Sign in with OTP first.
face.error_face_no_match: Face doesn't match. Try again or sign in with OTP.
face.error_face_model_mismatch: Model version changed. Please re-enroll your face.
face.error_face_already_enrolled: Face already registered. Use "Update Face" if you want to change.
face.error_face_login_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
face.error_no_phone_hint: Phone number not available. Sign in with OTP first.
face.low_confidence_warn: Signed in (low confidence). Consider re-enrolling your face.
face.no_face_tips: Tips: good lighting, face straight to camera, distance ~30cm.
face.engine_not_ready_title: Face Login Not Active in This Build
face.engine_not_ready_body: Face Login needs a "dev build" (not Expo Go) + TFLite model file. Developer must run: npx expo prebuild && npx expo run:ios. Meanwhile, use OTP login.

edit_profile.foto_permission: Gallery permission denied. Enable in Settings to pick a photo.
edit_profile.notice: To change profile photo, contact your branch admin. Change home branch via separate Settings menu.
